title: dryopteris noveboracensis
intro: Dryopteris noveboracensis, also known as the eastern wood fern, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris noveboracensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, fever, and digestive issues.
